title: Clinic Prescription Letterpad Design

title: Clinic Promo Video Editing Needed
desc: I have a batch of short promotional clips for my clinic that need to be shaped into polished, 1-2-minute videos. The finished pieces should feel friendly and approachable—warm tones, inviting pacing, and an overall comforting vibe that mirrors the atmosphere patients find when they walk through our doors. Here’s what I will supply: • Raw footage, our logo, and brand colours • A recorded voice-over track for each video • Key talking points for any on-screen text What I need from you: • Clean, seamless editing with gentle transitions • Royalty-free background music that complements the voice-over without overpowering it • Clear text overlays highlighting services, offers, or calls-to-action • Balanced audio, basic colour correction, and final exports in HD (horizontal and, if possible, a square or vertical cut for social media) I’m happy to collaborate on style tweaks but expect the first draft to be close to final so we can keep revisions minimal. Deliver the rendered files plus the editable project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve—whichever you prefer) so my team can make minor future updates in-house. If this sounds like a good fit, let’s talk timelines and get started.

title: Conference poster (24 hour turnover)
desc: I am looking for an experienced academic poster designer to turn an existing research poster, manuscript, and abstract into a professional, visually clear conference poster. The poster should: * Use the existing poster as a starting point, but improve the structure, hierarchy, spacing, and visual flow * Convert manuscript-style content into concise poster text * Emphasise the research question, methods, key findings, and take-home message * Make the figures the visual focus, rather than relying on large blocks of text * Use a clean academic design suitable for a health, neuroscience, or biomedical research conference * Avoid clutter and excessive text * Include clear section headings and logical flow * Be delivered as a print-ready PDF and an editable source file Final deliverables: * Print-ready PDF * Editable version in PowerPoint, Canva, or Adobe Illustrator * Poster size: A1 landscape, 84.1 cm × 59.4 cm Important details: * This is a conferenc

Each post should carry a clear call-to-action that directs people to my checkout page or DMs for quick conversions, and you’ll optimise captions, hashtags, and timing so we squeeze the most out of every impression. title: Dynamic Gym Video Editor
desc: I run a fitness channel and I need an editor who can turn my raw workout footage into energetic, scroll-stopping content. Expect plenty of burpees, heavy lifts, and explosive movement—your job is to match that energy on screen. Transitions and effects I like my cuts fast and my transitions dynamic and flashy. Each video should feel like one continuous burst of action, supported by clean text overlays for reps or tips, crisp slow-motion highlights, and a consistent color grade that really makes the sweat and steel pop. Workflow Every week I will send over 3–4 video sets. First, you will receive a small batch of clips as a trial; show me your approach and I will let you know if we are a fit. Once approved, we roll into a monthly arrangement with a steady flow of footage. Turnaround needs to keep pace with my posting schedule, so reliable delivery is essential. Tools Use whichever editor you prefer—Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or any tool you have mastered—so long as the final files export cleanly in both 4K and vertical formats for social platforms. title: Engaging TikTok-Style Product Video
desc: I’m looking for a quick, punchy edit—30 to 40 seconds—built for the TikTok/Reels feed. The structure is classic short-form: a strong hook in the first two seconds, fast pacing, clear CTA at the end, and, most importantly, lively animated transitions that keep viewers swiping for more. Here’s what I’ll hand over: a folder with selected product photos and a few raw clips. Feel free to supplement them with any royalty-free or stock footage you think heightens the story; I’m after a seamless blend of my assets and your own finds. I care about creativity, not just execution. Surprise me with fresh ideas for hooks, text overlays, or sound design that sell the products without looking like a hard sell. I’m happy to collaborate on concepts, but I need you to drive the vision. To be considered, show me past work in this vertical-video, high-energy style—links or short reels are perfect. Deliverables (vertical, 1080 × 1920): • Final 30–40 s MP4, ready for TikTok/IG • Editable project file (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar) • One round of tweaks after first draft If this sounds like your wheelhouse, let’s make something that stops the scroll.

title: I need a graphic designer to create social media posts
desc: Hello I'm Ben and I'm building a supplement brand. Currently I'm designing my own packaging and social media posts with AI and limited understanding of Canva. I really need help from a skilled designer to help me create content and brand visuals for this business. I am called Dashin Supplements I sell a recovery powder for runners. Targeting Belfast mainly as to try and start small in a very busy crowd. Please have an understanding of the UK market and what design will work to generate sales. Please avoid 100% AI proposal messages haha, it's very easy to tell. Don't need to write an essay I just want to hear from you not Sam Altman. Don't worry if you don't have a million Upwork reviews, doesn't matter to me - apply anyway I read them all. The task I need done now is to create a batch of Instagram posts. Thanks

title: Informational Flyer for Therapy Practice
desc: I have a brand logo and established brand colors, and I would like to create a simple, professional informational flyer for my therapy services. I may also include a QR code that families can scan to visit my website (the website will be completed within two weeks, so the QR code can be added later). The flyer should include: a brief overview of the therapy services offered; Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) for parents; examples of goals that can be targeted through therapy; and clear steps for getting started with services. The overall design should be clean, easy to read, and visually aligned with my brand identity.

title: Instagram/Facebook Reels Video Editor Needed
desc: Looking for a Skilled Short-Form Video Editor (Instagram/Facebook Reels) I am looking for an editor who can create engaging, story-driven social media reels rather than simple clip compilations. Project Requirements: - Create smooth, creative transitions between scenes. - Strong storytelling and pacing. - Modern Instagram/Facebook reel style editing. - Motion graphics, pop-up text, visual effects, and dynamic animations. - Color correction and enhancement to maintain bright, sharp, professional-looking footage. - Ability to combine animated scenes with live-action footage seamlessly. - Professional branded endings with logo integration and strong call-to-action screens. - Attention to detail and ability to follow creative direction. Example Structure: 1. Animated scene/story setup. 2. Creative transition into live-action footage. 3. Engaging on-camera presentation. 4. Dynamic captions and motion graphics throughout. 5. Branded ending with CTA and logo. Please apply only if you can provide examples of: - Storytelling-based reels. - Real estate, hospitality, or business promotional content. - Motion graphics and animated text work. - Before/after color grading examples. When applying, please share 3-5 of your best reels that demonstrate strong storytelling, transitions, motion grap

title: Label Artwork Designer
desc: We are seeking a skilled Label Artwork Designer to create artwork for supplement labels. The role involves designing and formatting labels according to provided specifications. The ideal candidate should have experience in print design and be proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator. Attention to detail and the ability to meet deadlines are essential. This is a part-time project with a short-term engagement.

title: Luxury Digital Invitation Designer Needed for Premium Rum Launch Event
desc: ROAR Spirits is launching its premium rum brand with an exclusive invitation-only launch event in London, and we’re looking for a talented designer to create a high-end digital invitation that guests will receive via WhatsApp, email and social media. We are not looking for a standard event flyer. We want something that feels like a cross between a luxury fashion campaign, movie premiere invitation and premium spirits launch. The ROAR brand is inspired by jungle culture, adventure, exclusivity and premium experiences. Deliverables: • Luxury digital invitation (static image) • WhatsApp-friendly format • Email-friendly format • Instagram post version • Instagram Story version • Source files included (PSD, AI or equivalent) Bonus Skills (Not Essential): • Motion graphics • Animated invitations • Luxury hospitality branding • Premium alcohol or spirits branding experience Design Direction: • Premium and sophisticated • Black and gold colour palette • Jungle-inspired aesthetic • Cinematic feel • Exclusive / invitation-only atmosphere • High-end luxury brand look To apply, please send: 1. Examples of luxury invitations you have designed 2. Examples of hospitality, nightlife, luxury or premium branding work 3. Your estimated turnaround time 4. Whether you can also create an animated vers

title: Luxury Label Design for Dietary Supplement
desc: Looking for an experienced supplement packaging designer for a premium wellness brand. I need a luxury label design for a dietary supplement in a matte finish. The design should be elegant and sophisticated, appealing to a high-end audience. The project requires creativity and attention to detail to ensure the label stands out in the market.

title: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets
desc: Project Brief: Marketing Collateral & Brand Assets Deliverables: Branded Presentation Folder, One-Page Service Overview, and Branded Sample Case Notes Template. 1. Project Overview & Branding Guidelines The organization provides premier, high-quality case management services, with a significant focus on complex motor vehicle accident (MVA) cases. Our work is professional, meticulous, and deeply supportive. All design deliverables must reflect this premium standard. For branding reference, color palettes, typography, and visual tone, please utilize our website. The aesthetic should be clean, modern, trustworthy, and polished. 2. Detailed Deliverable Specifications Deliverable 1: Branded Two-Pocket Presentation Folder • Purpose: To serve as the primary physical package handed to attorneys, medical providers, and clients containing our marketing materials, assessments, and reports. • Physical Specifications: Standard 9" x 12" presentation folder with two interior pockets. The right-hand interior pocket must feature standard die-cut slits to hold a business card. • Design Requirements: • Front Cover: Minimalist, clean, and high-impact. Must prominently feature the logo, brand colors, and core tagline/aesthetic. • Back Cover: Clean design containing essential company contact informati

title: Marketing Coordinator / Digital Marketing Specialist
desc: We are looking for a career-minded Marketing Coordinator / Digital Marketing Specialist who wants stable, long-term employment with a growing company. ■ PTO and Health Insurance Available This is not a short-term gig. This is not a temporary freelance project. This is not a side hustle position. This is a real opportunity for someone who wants to become part of a professional team, improve their skills, receive support, and grow long term. Our company supports businesses with digital marketing, lead generation, paid advertising, branding, social media management, funnels, CRM support, and overall marketing growth strategies. Responsibilities • Creating and managing engaging social media content across multiple platforms • Designing graphics and marketing materials using Canva • Editing and publishing short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts, Ads) • Scheduling content and managing posting calendars • Monitoring social media engagement and audience interaction • Running and optimizing Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns • Monitoring advertising performance, budgets, and conversions • Generating and nurturing leads through organic and paid marketing strategies • Improving funnels and lead conversion processes • Tracking KPIs and campaign performance • Analyzing m

title: Meta Ads Designer Needed for 3 Parenting Retargeting Static Creatives
desc: We are looking for a direct-response Meta ads designer to create 3 static retargeting ad creatives for TeenTalk, a parenting support system for parents of teens. These are not generic social media posts or cold ads. They are bridge creatives for a video-qualified audience — designed to move warm parents from recognition into our story-driven landing page. The audience has already watched 50%+ of our video ads. The goal is to move warm parents from recognition into action and bring them to the landing page with the right expectation. The creative should make the right parent feel: “This is about me, my teen, my pattern at home — and there may be a real way forward.” Target audience: - English-speaking mothers - Parents of a teen / preteen - Emotionally tired, relationship-driven, and aware there is a real problem at home - They do not want random parenting advice anymore - They are looking for a real system, not one more tip Final deliverables: - 3 static Meta ad creative concepts - Each concept delivered in 3 formats: 1) 9:16 — 1080×1920 — Stories / Reels 2) 4:5 — 1080×1350 — Feed 3) 1:1 — 1080×1080 — Square / flexible placements - Total: 9 exported final image files - Editable source files included if possible: Canva, Figma, Photoshop or Illustrator - Commercial-use / royalty-fr

title: Need Graphic Designers for Course Workbook
desc: Organization: Giving Hope Finding Hope (Non-Profit) Project Type: Contract / Freelance Summary Giving Hope Finding Hope, a non-profit dedicated to supporting individuals aging out of foster care and those from under-resourced communities, is seeking skilled and creative Graphic Designers to develop visual assets for our different life-skills courses. We are building several standalone educational courses (not one module-based curriculum), and each course needs clear, engaging, youth-friendly graphics to support both teachers and students. These courses include topics such as: • Financial Literacy • Hygiene & Self-Care • Transportation • Housing • Home Maintenance • Cooking & Nutrition • Etiquette & Communication • Career & Academic Success …and more. Designers will help bring educational content to life through accessible visuals that make these courses easier to understand for teens, young adults, and older learners. ________________________________________ What We Are Looking For We need graphic designers with experience in one or more of the following: 1. Educational & Instructional Graphics • Infographics • Diagrams & flowcharts • Step-by-step visuals • Icons & symbols • Worksheets and handouts 2. Course Branding & Layout Design • Consistent course theme/identity • Page layou

title: Ongoing Packaging Designer (Illustrator), Wellness Brand, Multi-SKU, Regular Updates
desc: We're an early-stage wellness brand launching across two product lines (oral strips and transdermal patches) in the US and Australian markets. We're looking for an Illustrator designer for ongoing freelance work, not a one-off project. What we provide: Dielines from our supplier All copy, written and approved Brand colors, logo (vector .ai), and fonts Existing artwork from our other product line as a structural reference What you do: Lay out the artwork in Illustrator following our instructions Keep files clean and layered so we can iterate Export print-ready files (CMYK, bleeds, fonts outlined) Turn around small edits and new SKU variants quickly Initial project: 3 SKUs across 6 components for our US launch (tin, carton, pouch, two wallet sizes, leaflet). Ongoing: new SKUs, regional variants, regular copy updates, and occasional new components across both product lines. Who we're looking for: Solid Illustrator skills and packaging or print experience Detail-oriented, since small text on packaging needs to be accurate Responsive and good at following a brief Available for ongoing work, not just one project We're a startup, so we move fast, give clear direction, and value designers who get things done without lots of back-and-forth.

title: Packaging & Dropper Label Designer for Dietary Supplement Brand
desc: I am looking for a packaging and label designer to create a professional, clean, and compliant design for a dietary supplement brand. The project includes the design of a custom dropper bottle label and secondary packaging box for a 60 mL / 2 fl oz liquid supplement. We already have the bottle measurements and a general idea of the brand direction, but we need a designer to create a polished, high-quality final design. The ideal freelancer should have experience with: - Supplement packaging design - Dropper bottle labels - Secondary packaging / folding cartons - FDA-compliant supplement label layout - Supplement Facts panel organization - Clean, premium, wellness-focused branding - Adobe Illustrator final files The design should have a soft, child-friendly visual direction without being excessive, since the supplement is intended for both kids and adults. We want the final look to feel minimalistic, clean, safe, trustworthy, and professional. We need someone who can help organize the required label information properly, including the Supplement Facts, suggested use, warnings, ingredients, FDA disclaimer, barcode area, and manufacturer information. The final design should look modern, trustworthy, and professional, suitable for selling on platforms like Amazon and TikTok Shop.

title: Packaging Design for Dental Product
desc: I need someone to help design packaging for a dental product that will be sold in dental offices as well as Amazon. I will also need help modifying the packaging to ensure it meets both retail and Amazon standards. The ideal candidate should have experience in packaging design, particularly for dental products, and be able to create visually appealing and functional designs.

title: Packaging Designer Needed for Holiday Soap Gift Set Packaging
desc: Packaging Designer Needed for Holiday Soap Gift Set Packaging We are looking for a packaging designer / packaging artist to help us create retail-ready holiday packaging for our Plantlife bar soap gift sets. We already have mockups of the design direction we like and final dielines for the boxes, but the dielines do not exactly match the mockups, so we need someone who can adapt the artwork properly to the actual packaging layout. Project Details: 2 box sizes 3 bars of soap, 4.5 oz each 3 bars of soap, 2 oz each Packaging is for retail shelf display We want the design to feel: modern fresh fun eye-catching consistent with the Plantlife brand Design Direction: We especially like the style of one of our current brown mockups and would be open to using that general style direction on the smaller box as well. We want something festive and appealing for holiday shoppers, while still fitting within our overall line. One brand element we want to keep in mind is that on many of our products, we place our brand name in a contrasting color bar at the bottom (often black), so we’d like the new packaging to stay visually consistent with that approach. We may also want to include a link to our website. What We Need: A designer who can take our ideas/mockups and apply them to the actual dielin
